# Abdul Mateen Khilji — jealous.dev

## Who I am

Abdul Mateen Khilji is a full stack web developer with 3+ years of experience building fast, scalable web applications for startups and businesses. Based in Pakistan, available for freelance projects worldwide.

## Specializations

- Next.js (App Router, SSR, SSG, ISR)
- TypeScript, React
- Node.js, REST APIs, GraphQL
- PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- WordPress, Docker
- SaaS product development
- Landing pages and e-commerce

## Services

- Freelance web development (full stack)
- SaaS product development from scratch
- Landing page and marketing site development
- E-commerce store development
- WordPress custom development
- API development and integration

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://jealous.dev
- Projects: https://jealous.dev/projects
- Blog: https://jealous.dev/blog
- Contact: contact@jealous.dev

## Blog

Technical writing on Next.js, Node.js, Go, TypeScript, web architecture, SaaS, and full stack development. 25+ articles covering practical guides, tutorials, and engineering insights.

Topics covered: Next.js, micro-frontends, API design, WebSockets, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, WordPress, Stripe payments, AWS, and startup/SaaS tips.
